title: cancrinia eriobasis
intro: Cancrinia eriobasis, also known as the "Canarian spurge", is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Cancrinia eriobasis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
